---

title: "D04_08: Precision Poisson Analysis (All)"
subtitle: "Run Poisson regression on aggregated precision features"
parent: "D04_poisson_marketing"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D04_08"
date-created: "2025-12-24"
date-modified: "2025-12-30"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on:
  - "D04_09_feature_preparation"
outputs_to:
  - "processed_data.df_precision_poisson_analysis"
implements:
  - script: "all_D04_08.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/all/"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D04_08: Precision Poisson Analysis (All) {#overview}

This task runs Poisson regression on precision marketing features and writes a
consolidated analysis table for cross-platform insight.

## Implementation Scripts

| Platform | Script | Location | Output |
|----------|--------|----------|--------|
| All | `all_D04_08.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/all/` | `processed_data.df_precision_poisson_analysis` |

## Inputs

Primary input (preferred):
- `processed_data.df_precision_features` (from D04_09)

Fallback input (when aggregated features are missing):
- `processed_data.transformed_precision_{product_line}` tables

## Task Definition (NSQL)

```nsql
CALCULATE D04_08_precision_poisson:
  FROM processed_data.df_precision_features
  RUN univariate_poisson_regression FOR EACH predictor
  OUTPUT TO processed_data.df_precision_poisson_analysis
```

## Outputs

- `processed_data.df_precision_poisson_analysis`

## Notes

- Uses a univariate Poisson approach to avoid collinearity issues.
- Requires real data (MP029); if no data is available, the script exits with
  a warning and writes no rows.

## Next Task

Proceed to [D04_10: Module Consumers](D04_10_module_consumers.qmd) for UI
consumption mapping.
